---
title: "Day 5 — Consolidation & Future Directions"
subtitle: "Friday 19 June 2026"
---

## Theme

*Ensuring lasting impact and continued cross-disciplinary collaboration*

Day 5 finalizes all workshop deliverables: the Ten Simple Rules are reviewed and agreed, vignettes are presented, and participants leave with clear responsibilities and plans for post-workshop collaboration.

---

## Schedule

| Time | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 9:00–10:00 | **Plenary:** Review and finalize Ten Simple Rules · Presentations of vignettes and code examples |
| 10:00–10:30 | Morning break |
| 10:30–12:00 | Future tasks and responsibilities · Finalize action plans · Assign post-workshop responsibilities · Closing activity and celebration |
| 12:00–14:00 | Lunch |
| 14:00–15:30 | Optional activities (outreach to broader audience) |
| 15:30–16:00 | Afternoon break |
| 16:00–17:00 | Optional plenary / wrap-up |

---

## Learning Objectives

By the end of Day 5, participants will have:

1. Reviewed and collectively agreed on the **Ten Simple Rules for SA–IDM Integration**
2. Presented a **vignette** documenting their group's cross-disciplinary analytical approach
3. Identified **research gaps** requiring new methodology development
4. Established **post-workshop collaboration plans** with named responsibilities and timelines

---

## Workshop Deliverables

### Ten Simple Rules for SA–IDM Integration

*Final version will be linked here after the workshop. The rules will be submitted as a manuscript to PLOS Computational Biology or a similar venue.*

### Vignettes and Code Examples

*Vignettes presented on Day 5 will be posted here. All code is reproducible and available on the [workshop GitHub repository](https://github.com/kylieainslie/lorentz_center_workshop).*

### Community Resources

This website serves as the persistent home for:

- Workshop vignettes and code
- Ten Simple Rules document
- Links to related tools and packages
- Contact information for follow-up collaborations

---

## Post-Workshop Plans

| Deliverable | Lead | Timeline |
|-------------|------|----------|
| Finalize vignettes | Coding teams | *TBD* |
| Submit Ten Simple Rules manuscript | Writing team | *TBD* |
| Update this website | Organizers | *TBD* |

*Table will be filled in during Day 5 discussions*

---

::: {.callout-note}
Thank you for participating in the **Connecting Survival Analysis and Infectious Disease Modeling** workshop at the Lorentz Center. We look forward to the continued collaborations and community resources that emerge from this week.
:::
